compiled_state.title: [test-plugin-boundary-migration]: test-dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.sh references old plugins/dso/docs/designs path -> migration test fails
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Actual Behavior
tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh fails because tests/scripts/test-dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.sh still references the old plugins/dso/docs/designs/dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.md path (lines 9 and 22). The migration test scans *.md/*.sh for old plugins/dso/docs/designs/ references.

## Expected Behavior
test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh should pass. The design doc at plugins/dso/docs/designs/dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.md should be migrated to docs/designs/ (project-local per CLAUDE.md rule 26), and test-dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.sh updated to reference the new path.

## Reproduction
Run: bash tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh
Observe FAIL: old path references still present in *.md/*.sh

## Observed
Discovered when staging plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json for story 6121-46dc — plugin.json is linked to test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh via .test-index, causing the pre-existing failure to block the commit.
